zh.lifeSummary: 當Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große於1105年出生在巴登時，他的父親Hermann II. von Baden, Markgraf von Baden35歲，母親Judith von Backnang-SULICHGAU31歲。他於1134年與Bertha von Lothringen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1160年1月16日在德國巴登-爾特波格雷姆斯-姆-可萊斯巴可南享年55歲，埋葬在德國巴登-爾特波格雷姆斯-姆-可萊斯巴可南。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große于1105年出生在巴登时，他的父亲Hermann II. von Baden, Markgraf von Baden35岁，母亲Judith von Backnang-SULICHGAU31岁。他于1134年与Bertha von Lothringen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1160年1月16日在德国巴登-爾特波格雷姆斯-姆-可萊斯巴可南享年55岁，埋葬在德国巴登-爾特波格雷姆斯-姆-可萊斯巴可南。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Baden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German and Danish: patronymic from   Bade  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): probably an adoption of the German surname (see 1 above).

English: habitational name from a place called Bayden in Sussex, which is referred to in 17th-century documents but unlocated (it is possibly to be identified with Bainden, a manor in Mayfield, Sussex), or from Baydon in Wiltshire. The latter is from Old English beg + dūn, meaning ‘berry hill’.

variants.name: Bade
meanings: English (North Yorkshire) and Scottish: probably from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Bad(d)a, which is perhaps a short form of various compound names with the first element beadu ‘battle’.
North German: from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name composed with badu ‘strife, battle’.
North German: occupational name from Middle Low German bade ‘messenger’.

nameMeanings.name: Herman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Hermann , from a Germanic personal name derived from heri, hari ‘army’ + man ‘man’. The name was in use among the Normans and was borne by many immigrants from the Low Countries in the 15th century. Perhaps because of that it continued in occasional use well into the 1700s. It was revived more generally in Britain in the 19th century, when it also became common in America, most probably as a result of the influence of German immigrants.

nameMeanings.name: III.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große was born in 1105, in Baden, his father, Hermann II. von Baden, Markgraf von Baden, was 35 and his mother, Judith von Backnang-SULICHGAU, was 31. He married Bertha von Lothringen in 1134. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 16 January 1160, in Backnang, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 55, and was buried in Backnang, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große est né en 1105, à Baden, son père, Hermann II. von Baden, Markgraf von Baden, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Judith von Backnang-SULICHGAU, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Bertha von Lothringen en 1134. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 16 janvier 1160, à Backnang, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Backnang, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große 1105 in Baden geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hermann II. von Baden, Markgraf von Baden 35 und seine Mutter Judith von Backnang-SULICHGAU 31. Er hat 1134 Bertha von Lothringen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 16. Januar 1160 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Backnang, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland und wurde in Backnang, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große è nato il nel 1105 nel Baden, il suo padre, Hermann II. von Baden, Markgraf von Baden, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Judith von Backnang-SULICHGAU, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Bertha von Lothringen nel 1134. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 16 gennaio 1160, nel Backnang, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Backnang, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Herman III. von Baden genannt der Großeが1105年にバデンで生まれた時，父Hermann II. von Baden, Markgraf von Badenは35歳，母Judith von Backnang-SULICHGAUは31歳であった。1134年にBertha von Lothringenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1160年1月16日にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグレムス-ムル-クレイスバクナンで55歳で死去し，ドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグレムス-ムル-クレイスバクナンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große(이)가 1105년 바든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hermann II. von Baden, Markgraf von Baden(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith von Backnang-SULICHGAU(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1134년 Bertha von Lothringen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1160년 1월 16일 독일 바데-wu르테버그 렘스-머-크레이스 바c나그에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 바데-wu르테버그 렘스-머-크레이스 바c나그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große nasceu em 1105, em Baden, seu pai, Hermann II. von Baden, Markgraf von Baden, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Judith von Backnang-SULICHGAU, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Bertha von Lothringen em 1134. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 16 de janeiro de 1160, em Backnang, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Backnang, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große родился в 1105 г. в местности баден, его отцу по имени Hermann II. von Baden, Markgraf von Baden было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith von Backnang-SULICHGAU, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Bertha von Lothringen в 1134 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 16 января 1160 г. в местности баккнанг, ремс-мурр-крис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности баккнанг, ремс-мурр-крис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Herman III. von Baden genannt der Große nació en 1105, en Baden, su papá, Hermann II. von Baden, Markgraf von Baden, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Judith von Backnang-SULICHGAU, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Bertha von Lothringen en 1134. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 16 de enero de 1160, en Backnang, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Backnang, Rems-Murr-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania.
